title: Viewer launch demo is click-only graph inspection
summary: The launch viewer demo should avoid search/dropdown flows. The stronger product demo is a click only walkthrough of the interactive graph: fit the graph, click a useful runbook memory node, click a path relation node, cl
body:
The launch viewer demo should avoid search/dropdown flows. The stronger product demo is a click-only walkthrough of the interactive graph: fit the graph, click a useful runbook memory node, click a path relation node, click a decision memory node, click a source/code node, click a test file node, and let the side inspector plus edge labels show descriptions and relations.
Evidence: scripts/render-viewer-demo.mjs was updated and rerendered; inspected extracted frames show path relations, decision memory, and test file inspector states.
